prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年最低位次约1655→1584→1657→1580→1555，整体呈小幅波动中前移趋势（位次数字减小），近3年累计前移约102名；2025年基准约1555名，为近5年最 优位次；本省招生计划2021-2025年分别为49→49→50→53→57人，持续扩招；2026年计划63人，较2025年57人扩招约10.5%，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第54名持续上升至2026年第50名，首次进入全国前50，学校综合实力和影响力稳步提升；声誉平稳，未见明显负面 舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第64，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量中等；信息与通信工程A+（全国顶尖）、计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技术A- 、网络空间安全A-、软件工程A-等，在信息通信领域具有显著学科优势，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等核心专业社会热度持续高热 推荐；吉林省2026年物理类考生约8万人，较2025年基本持平；北京邮电大学位于北京，对吉林省考生具有较强地域吸引力；本 省招生计划逐年增加，2026年计划63人，较2021年增长约28.6%。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次前移趋势、2026年计划扩招约10.5%缓解竞争、软科排名首次进入前50提升学校吸 引力、核心专业持续高热等因素，考虑学校排名跃升带来的报考热度增加，预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约1623名，区间1380-1866名。

- 电子信息类（元班）
- 计算机类（元班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 通信工程（大类招生）
- 电子信息类
- 计算机类
- 低空技术与工程
- 软件工程。

- 网络空间安全（大类招生）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1380-1866名内，建议以二档通信工程、电子信息类、计算机类为主力填报，一档元班专业可冲刺，三档人工智能、网络空间安全等作为保底。位次明显优于区间 下限（1380名以内）可重点冲刺元班王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 1655 → 1584 → 1657 → 1580 → 1555, showing a slight fluctuation with a forward trend (decreasing ranking number), with a cumulative forward movement of about 102 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1555, the best ranking in the last 5 years; provincial enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 49 → 49 → 50 → 53 → 57, continuously expanding; the 2026 plan is 63 students, an increase of about 10.5% compared to 57 in 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has risen from 54th in 2021 to 50th in 2026, entering the national top 50 for the first time, with steadily improving comprehensive strength and influence; reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 64, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms; Information and Communication Engineering A+ (top in the country), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Cyberspace Security A-, Software Engineering A-, etc., with significant disciplinary advantages in the field of information and communication, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly popular and recommended; in 2026, there are about 80,000 physics category candidates in Jilin Province, roughly the same as in 2025; Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Jilin candidates; provincial enrollment plans have increased year by year, with 63 students planned in 2026, an increase of about 28.6% compared to 2021.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 plan expansion of about 10.5% easing competition, the Soft Science ranking entering the top 50 for the first time enhancing the school's appeal, and the continued high popularity of core majors, the increase in application enthusiasm due to the school's ranking leap is expected to slightly intensify competition; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1623, with a range of 1380-1866.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1380-1866, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Communication Engineering, Electronic Information, and Computer Science as the main choices, with Tier 1 Yuan Class majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors like Artificial Intelligence and Cyberspace Security as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1380), you can focus on reaching for the top Yuan Class majors.
